query: SELECT configKey, LENGTH(configValue) as len, LEFT(configValue, 10) as prefix, RIGHT(configValue, 4) as suffix FROM platform_config WHERE configKey IN ('TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID', 'TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN', 'TWILIO_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID', 'TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER', 'TWILIO_TEST_MODE');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AafxdxuLDwTXdt.root --database Dw4mhfnuurFcniLsqjLpWN --execute SELECT configKey, LENGTH(configValue) as len, LEFT(configValue, 10) as prefix, RIGHT(configValue, 4) as suffix FROM platform_config WHERE configKey IN ('TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID', 'TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN', 'TWILIO_VERIFY_SERVICE_SID', 'TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER', 'TWILIO_TEST_MODE');
